chapter_title.en: Prayer of the Sick, the Unconcious, the Weak and the Infirm, the Elderly and Others

parts.text: 1059 - وَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «اَلْأَعْمَى إِذَا صَلَّى لِغَيْرِ اَلْقِبْلَةِ فَإِنْ كَانَ فِي

text: وَقْتٍ فَلْيُعِدْ وَ إِنْ كَانَ قَدْ مَضَى اَلْوَقْتُ فَلاَ يُعِيدُ»

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1059 - Imam (as) said:
"If a blind person prays facing the wrong direction, and if it is during the time of the prayer, then he should repeat it. But if the time has passed, he does not need to repeat it."
